name: Dr. Priya Sharma
bio: Dr. Priya Sharma leads the Language Intelligence Lab where she investigates transformer-based language models, with a focus on sentiment analysis across low-resource languages. Her recent work examines failure modes of instruction-tuned models and develops calibration techniques for reducing hallucination in clinical text summarization. She has pioneered a benchmark for evaluating LLM robustness on code-mixed Hindi-English queries. Her group currently explores efficient fine-tuning strategies for domain adaptation under limited compute budgets.
